title: KillsLog
description: Logs player kills by players. Saves inventory and places.
body:
# KillsLog
**Allows you to view all player kills by players.**

## Commands
- **/kills** - help menu
- **/kills last** - last 5 kills
- **/kills search** <killer/victim> <nick> - search for the murderer/victim by nickname
- **/kills id <ID>** - search by ID

## Buttons inside the responses:
- **[inv]/[inventory]** - opens the inventory of the victim at the time of the kill
- **[pos]/[position]** - menu with the coordinates of the kill
- **[DELETE]** - delete entry
- **[TP]** - teleport to place 
- **[COPY]** - copy coordinates of the kill
